description: You are a radio producer assembling a commercial spot. Create a track named 'Voiceover' containing the audio from /home/ga/Audio/samples/narration.wav, time-stretched to exactly 25.0 seconds without altering the pitch. The audio must start at 0.0 seconds. Export the final audio to /home/ga/Audio/export/ad_voiceover_25s.wav and save the session.
